{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Flowing Starlight
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses the [[Flowing Starlight]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Flowing Starlight]] is a technique used by [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
